name: pm2_5_mean
description: Predicted mean PM2.5 concentrations for the forecast date. Unit: µg/m³.

name: pm2_5_min
description: Predicted minimum PM2.5 concentrations for the forecast date. Unit: µg/m³.

name: pm2_5_max
description: Predicted maximum PM2.5 concentrations for the forecast date. Unit: µg/m³.

name: pm2_5_low
description: q10 percentile lower bounds of the PM2.5 forecast confidence interval.

name: pm2_5_high
description: q90 percentile upper bounds of the PM2.5 forecast confidence interval.

name: forecast_confidence
description: Confidence level of the PM2.5 forecast. Unit: %.

name: air_pressure_at_sea_level
description: Mean daily air pressure reduced to sea level. Unit: hPa.

name: air_temperature
description: Mean daily near-surface air temperature. Unit: degrees Celsius.

name: cloud_area_fraction
description: Mean daily cloud cover fraction. Unit: %.

name: precipitation_amount
description: Total daily precipitation amount. Unit: mm.

name: wind_from_direction
description: Mean daily wind direction. Unit: degrees.

name: wind_speed
description: Mean daily wind speed. Unit: m/s.

name: created_at
description: Timestamp when the forecast record was created.
